description: NULL mutant — inserts an extra space in a whitespace-insensitive location. Behaviourally identical; both the legacy spec and the v2 journey MUST still pass. Guards against a broken harness that reports false kills (e.g. a build failure counted as 'caught').

Plan-tab DAG never marks a node archived — data-archived stays 'false' and the archived pill/dashed border never render. The journey's archived-child assertions (data-archived="true", plan-node-archived-pill) must fail. Legacy home is the dedicated archived-children spec (the gate-status spec only reads the attribute on live nodes, never asserts ="true").

Plan node always emits an empty data-plan-gate-status attribute regardless of the resolved child's gate progress. The journey's route-injected gateStatus:failed assertion (toHaveAttribute data-plan-gate-status failed) must fail.

The no-workflows warning banner never renders and the Create-Goal button is never disabled for a project with zero workflows. The journey's empty-workflows-route assertions (banner visible + Create button disabled) must fail.
The goal-proposal 'Streaming…' badge never renders during a streaming proposal. The journey's 'streaming badge visible during STAY_BUSY stream' assertion must fail.

The goal-proposal submit button is no longer disabled while a proposal is streaming (drops the !!config.streaming guard). The journey's 'submit disabled while streaming then enables' assertion must fail.
Proposal panel tabs never show the unread/active dot (goal-tab-dot). The journey's 'role proposal tab appears with dot' assertion (.goal-tab-dot visible) must fail.
hasUnseenActivity never reports unseen activity, so the sidebar unread dot (.unseen-dot) never renders for a fresh session. The journey's 'fresh session has unseen dot' assertion (count 1) must fail.

search: const pending = dashboardPendingMutations.filter(m => m.expiresAt === undefined || m.expiresAt > now);
replace: const pending = dashboardPendingMutations.filter(m => m.expiresAt === undefined || m.expiresAt < now);
description: Non-expired pending plan mutations are treated as expired and filtered out, so the pending-mutation card never renders. The journey's 'pending mutation card renders from route-mocked endpoint' assertion must fail.

The goal-status-widget render guard is inverted — the pill renders NOTHING whenever a goalId is present (i.e. always hidden on a team-lead session). The journey's 'goal-status-widget pill visible on team-lead session' assertion must fail.

The multi-agent delegate card header count is off by one ('Delegated to 3 agents' for 2 delegates). The journey's 'TEAM_DELEGATE_CARD_PARALLEL renders multi-agent card' assertion (getByText 'Delegated to 2 agents') must fail.

Every live GOAL matches any search query (includes('') always true), so the sidebar search never hides non-matching goals. Legacy search-e2e SR-01 asserts a non-matching goal title is hidden after search; the v2 sidebar-nav journey only exercises SESSION-title search (never goal-title), so this is expected to expose a real journey gap: goal-title sidebar search is uncovered by the consolidated journey.

The Fork action is never visible in the sidebar-actions popover. The journey's 'sidebar actions popover contains expected action items' assertion (fork action visible) must fail. Legacy home is session-actions.spec.ts (sidebar-actions-menu.spec.ts's fork test is test.skip'd as fixture-covered).
The message composer never restores a persisted prompt draft on session (re)bind. The journey's draft-persistence-across-reload assertion (textarea value contains the drafted text) must fail.
The directory-browser confirm button is relabelled 'Choose current'. The project-onboarding journey selects the button by hasText 'Select current'; the enable/click assertions must fail.
The directory-browser overlay loses its add-project-browse-dialog testid. The project-onboarding journey's 'Browse button opens add-project-browse-dialog overlay' assertion must fail.
The directory-browser 'Up' button loses its add-project-browse-up testid. The project-onboarding journey's 'Browse modal shows directory entries and Up button' assertion must fail.

document.title drops the ' · Bobbit' suffix. Legacy page-title.spec.ts asserts document.title matches /.+ · Bobbit$/; the app-smoke journey only checks the title is non-empty (GAP) — expected real hole.

The API error modal's message element loses its error-details-message testid. Legacy api-error-modal.spec.ts asserts the server error surfaces in error-details-message; the misc journey does not exercise the error modal (GAP) — expected real hole.

The cost popover's cache-hit row loses its cost-cache-hit testid. Legacy cost-popover-cache-hit.spec.ts asserts the cache-hit % renders; the misc journey only best-effort checks a cost element (GAP) — expected real hole.

The workflow-checklist gate-signal-badge count is off by one ('2 signals' for 1 signal). Legacy goal-dashboard-fanout.spec.ts asserts the '1 signal' badge after a gate signal; the team-operations journey stops at the 201 and never asserts the badge (GAP) — expected real hole.

The goal-status pill always reports data-awaiting-signoffs="true". Legacy goal-status-widget.spec.ts asserts it is 'false' with no pending sign-offs; the team-operations journey only checks the pill is visible (GAP) — expected real hole.

The proposal tool card's Open button loses its proposal-open-button testid. Legacy proposal-tools.spec.ts asserts the Open button on the tool card; the proposals journey does not drive the tool-card Open flow (GAP) — expected real hole.

search: slash-menu at-menu border-b border-border max-h-48 overflow-y-auto
replace: slash-menu atmenu-mut border-b border-border max-h-48 overflow-y-auto
description: The @-mention autocomplete menu loses its at-menu class. Legacy at-mention.spec.ts asserts the .at-menu opens on '@'; the prompt-interaction journey does not exercise @-mention (GAP) — expected real hole.

The Send button is no longer disabled on an empty composer. Legacy stories-sessions.spec.ts (S-01) asserts Send is disabled when the composer is empty; the stories-registry journey does not assert Send-disabled (GAP) — expected real hole.

The session-model-fallback settings toggle loses its testid. Legacy settings-model-fallback.spec.ts asserts the toggle default + PUT round-trip; the project-settings journey only shows the models route (GAP) — expected real hole.

A goal-scoped staff trigger no longer labels its wake prompt 'required'. Campaign result: BOTH-MISSED — the legacy staff-triggers.spec.ts does NOT assert this label either (it covers the trigger dropdown + PUT/GET round-trip), so this is a pre-existing browser-e2e gap, not a consolidation regression (tracked in consolidation-assertion-parity.md). Add a staff-trigger-editor assertion when that editor flow is journey-covered.

The Add-Project preflight panel always reports data-has-fail="0", so failing checks never block Continue. Legacy add-project-preflight.spec.ts asserts data-has-fail=1 + Continue disabled for a nested-in-project path; the project-onboarding journey never inspects the preflight panel (GAP) — expected real hole.

The marketplace 'Research Preview' banner loses its testid. Legacy marketplace.spec.ts asserts the research-preview banner renders; the marketplace-packs journey only checks route/tabs (GAP/PARTIAL) — expected real hole.
Auto-retry banner loses its testid. Legacy auto-retry-banner.spec.ts injects auto_retry_pending and asserts the banner; the misc journey does not (GAP).
GitHub trusted-host Add control loses its testid. Legacy github-trusted-hosts.spec.ts asserts add/remove persistence; app-smoke journey does not (GAP).
Sidebar per-project Staff header loses its testid. Legacy staff-sub-section.spec.ts asserts the staff header + rows under Staff; staff-debug journey only checks the #/staff heading (GAP).
Footer image-model id loses its testid. Legacy image-model-selector-lock.spec.ts asserts the footer image-model id + persistence; the misc journey does not (GAP).
Marketplace Installed panel loses its testid. Legacy market-activation.spec.ts asserts the installed-panel toggle cycle; marketplace-packs journey only checks route/sources (GAP).

The 'Show Headquarters in project lists' toggle label is renamed. Legacy headquarters.spec.ts selects it via getByLabel('Show Headquarters in project lists'); the stories-registry journey does not (GAP). (Retargeted from the testid, which the legacy spec does not assert.)

Archived sidebar rows lose their grayscale dimming. Legacy sidebar-archived-layout.spec.ts asserts a [style*='grayscale(1)'] element after Show Archived; the sidebar-nav journey does not (GAP). (Retargeted from the divider testid, which the legacy spec does not assert.)
The #/roles 'New Role' button is relabelled. Legacy role-assistant-new.spec.ts clicks 'New Role' and asserts a 201 session + hash + textarea; the project-settings journey does not (GAP).
Replace-bobbit-with-text settings toggle loses its testid. Legacy replace-bobbit-text.spec.ts asserts the sprite<->text toggle; app-smoke journey does not (GAP).
Gate-bypass control loses its testid. Legacy gate-bypass.spec.ts drives the human-only bypass form; misc journey does not (GAP).
Customise-system-prompt control loses its testid. Legacy system-prompt-customise.spec.ts asserts the Created flow; project-settings journey does not (GAP).
Staff role select loses its testid. Legacy staff-role.spec.ts asserts role select + accessory prefill; staff-debug journey does not (GAP).
Goal-form parent picker loses its testid. Legacy subgoal-parent-picker-repro.spec.ts asserts eligibility marking; goal-editing journey does not (GAP).
Subgoals-enabled settings toggle loses its testid. Legacy subgoals-experimental-toggle.spec.ts asserts default-off + PUT + reload; goal-editing journey does not (GAP).
Goal-proposal workflow-error row loses its testid. Legacy failed-goal-proposal-ux.spec.ts asserts 'Workflow is required' + Create disabled; proposals journey does not (GAP).
Max-nesting-depth stepper loses its testid. Legacy subgoal-nesting-limit.spec.ts asserts default/edit/persist; goal-editing journey does not (GAP).
Goal-form max-depth control loses its testid. Legacy goal-proposal-subgoal-prefill.spec.ts asserts prefilled subgoal controls; proposals journey does not (GAP).

Workflow-editor step-type control loses its testid. Legacy workflow-editor.spec.ts asserts step-type options + round-trip; misc journey does not (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Workflow Editor).
Worktree-cleanup maintenance card loses its testid. Legacy settings-maintenance-archived-worktrees.spec.ts asserts counts + cleanup POST; project-settings journey does not (GAP).

Goal-proposal Roles-tab reset control loses its testid. Legacy goal-role-tabs-wiring.spec.ts asserts the Roles tab editor; misc journey does not (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Goal Proposal Roles Tab).
Directory-picker typeahead suggestions container loses its testid. Legacy add-project-typeahead.spec.ts asserts the suggestion overlay; project-onboarding journey does not (GAP).

NULL mutant (clusterA) — inserts an extra space between two attributes in a lit template (whitespace-insensitive). Behaviourally identical; both the legacy spec and the v2 journey MUST still pass. Guards against a broken harness that reports false kills.

Stats-bar context tooltip loses its 'Context:' prefix. Legacy prompt-stats-e2e.spec.ts asserts span[title*='Context:'] + title=/Context:.*tokens/; misc journey previously had best-effort cost only (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Prompt Stats).

Open-in-new-tab preview href gains a cache-buster it must never carry. Legacy preview-happy-path.spec.ts asserts the new-tab href has no ?mtime=; misc journey previously checked only the live iframe src (PARTIAL). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Preview Artifacts — new-tab href + refresh).

The success/complete compaction summary card (non-error render path) loses its testid. Legacy compaction-persistence.spec.ts asserts a seeded sidecar renders [data-testid=compaction-summary-card] with data-state=complete surviving reload; misc journey previously only asserted the editor loaded (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Compaction).

The sidebar 'Full Search' link navigates to a non-search route. Legacy search-e2e.spec.ts SR-02 asserts the click sets the hash to #/search carrying the query; sidebar-nav journey never clicked Full Search (PARTIAL). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.

The session actions 'Open in new window' item opens the deep link in the SAME tab (_self) instead of a new window (_blank). Legacy open-session-new-window.spec.ts asserts window.open captured {target:'_blank', features:'noopener'}; app-smoke journey never exercised it (GAP). Ported into app-smoke.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Open in New Window).

search: class="file-mention-chip-pill inline-flex items-center gap-1 align-baseline px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md
replace: class="file-mention-chip-pill-mut inline-flex items-center gap-1 align-baseline px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md
description: The file-mention chip pill loses its stable class. Legacy at-mention.spec.ts selects a file from the @-menu and asserts a live .file-mention-chip-pill renders; the prompt-interaction journey only opened the .at-menu (GAP). Ported into prompt-interaction.journey.spec.ts.

The goal-proposal Metadata tab loses its add-row control testid. Legacy goal-metadata.spec.ts drives the Metadata tab and adds/edits/removes rows; the app-smoke journey covered none of the proposal Metadata tab (GAP). Ported into app-smoke.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Goal Proposal Metadata Tab).

The Filters popover 'Show Read' toggle row loses its stable testid (data-testid is built from the row id). Legacy sidebar-filters.spec.ts targets [data-testid='sidebar-filter-read']; the sidebar-nav journey never opened the Filters popover's Read toggle (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.

The review pane Approve button loses its accessible name. Legacy review-pane.spec.ts clicks getByRole button 'Approve' and asserts the approve feedback posts to chat + the Review tab closes; misc journey only opened the review document (PARTIAL). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Review Commenting).

A sent user-message stops rendering its image attachment tile. Legacy image-attach-roundtrip.spec.ts attaches a PNG + ECHO_IMAGE_BLOCK and asserts 'user-message attachment-tile' renders; misc journey had no image-attachment coverage (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Image Attachment).

The router stops recognising the deprecated #/workflows hash, so the project-scoped redirect never fires. Legacy workflow-page-scope.spec.ts asserts #/workflows redirects to #/settings/<projectId>/workflows (never system); misc journey never exercised the redirect (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Workflow Editor). (Retargeted from a dead redirect call-site to the single upstream route parser after a both-missed result.)

search: class="ask-submit px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded
replace: class="ask-submit-x px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded
description: PROVE-HELD: the ask_user_choices widget submit button loses its .ask-submit class. The prompt-interaction journey already drives the widget happy path (pick → submit → widget read-only) via .ask-submit, so this must be v2-caught with no new port. Confirms the PARTIAL is genuinely held.

The sidebar New Goal button loses its title, so the New-Goal→goal-assistant flow cannot be reached. Legacy sidebar-goal-staff.spec.ts asserts New Goal opens the goal assistant; sidebar-nav journey never exercised it (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts via createGoalAssistantViaUI.

The per-project New Session button loses its 'New session' title, so button[title^='New session'] no longer resolves it. Legacy sidebar-session-actions.spec.ts (SB-14) clicks it to create a session; sidebar-nav journey only asserted the button was visible, never clicked (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.

A follow-up queued mid-turn loses its .queue-pill styling hook. Legacy queue-ui.spec.ts asserts a .queue-pill + .steer-btn appear when a message is queued during streaming; prompt-interaction journey had no queue coverage (GAP). Ported into prompt-interaction.journey.spec.ts (STAY_BUSY).

Escape in the composer no longer aborts a streaming agent. Legacy escape-aborts-anywhere.spec.ts asserts Escape aborts (Stop button disappears); prompt-interaction journey had no abort coverage (GAP). Ported into prompt-interaction.journey.spec.ts (STAY_BUSY → Escape → stop cleared).

The tool-permission-card grant button loses its 'Allow just <tool>' label. Legacy tool-ask-policy.spec.ts fires a tool-grant-request on an ask-policy role and clicks 'Allow just Bash' to grant; prompt-interaction journey had no permission-card coverage (GAP). Ported into prompt-interaction.journey.spec.ts.

A full-search goal result navigates to the wrong goal id. Legacy search-result-navigation.spec.ts clicks a goal result card and asserts the hash contains the goal id; sidebar-nav journey never opened full-search results (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.

Ctrl+ArrowDown walks the sidebar the WRONG direction (up). Legacy sidebar-keyboard-nav.spec.ts asserts Ctrl+ArrowDown visits data-nav-id rows in DOM order; app-smoke journey never exercised keyboard nav (GAP). Ported into app-smoke.journey.spec.ts.

The multi-project New-Goal picker buttons lose their data-project-id, so a project cannot be picked. Legacy stories-goal-routing.spec.ts asserts the toolbar New Goal opens a project picker and the picked project scopes the goal; stories journey never exercised multi-project routing (GAP). Ported into stories-registry.journey.spec.ts.

The dashboard Children-tab 'Allow sub-goals' settings toggle loses its testid. Legacy subgoal-existing-goal-settings.spec.ts drives it to enable subgoals on an existing parent + persist; goal-editing journey only asserts tab-children presence (GAP).

The Agent Directory maintenance Validate button loses its testid. Legacy settings-agent-dir.spec.ts asserts the validate control enables after a path is entered; project-settings journey does not (GAP).
The editable-proposal Apply/Accept button label loses its testid. Legacy proposal-edit-flow.spec.ts locates the Apply button via accept-label; proposals journey does not (GAP).
The multi-repo scan checklist selected-count readout loses its testid. Legacy add-project-select-all.spec.ts asserts the count text through select/deselect; project-onboarding journey does not (GAP).

The add-project preflight archive-CTA (surfaced when a ghost .bobbit/ dir is detected) loses its testid. Legacy add-project-post-archive.spec.ts drives the CTA; project-onboarding journey does not (GAP).

The non-goal terminate confirmation drops the enumerated child-agent NAMES (keeps only the count). Legacy archive-child-cascade.spec.ts asserts each child title appears in the modal; team-operations journey only checks the children-count API, not the modal names (GAP).

After a goal is archived the dashboard read-only banner text changes so it no longer says 'Dashboard is read-only.'. Legacy goal-archive-always-on.spec.ts asserts the banner text post-archive; goal-editing journey only polls the archived flag via API (GAP).

The optional-step tooltip drops the workflow step description from its title attribute. Legacy goal-form-tooltips.spec.ts asserts title=/QA agent/i + /ephemeral server/i; goal-editing journey only asserts the icon/cursor-help/text (GAP).

The dev-harness Restart Server control renders even when the harness restart endpoint is unavailable (its hide-guard is disabled). Legacy settings-restart-button.spec.ts asserts the button is absent by default; project-settings journey does not (GAP).

The unified onProposal path stops mirroring the merged goal spec into the form-mirror (previewSpec), so an edit_proposal revision does not auto-update the assistant panel in place. Legacy goal-proposal-revision-autoupdate.spec.ts asserts the edited spec appears with no 'Open proposal' click; proposals journey never drives a revision (GAP).

The goal-proposal Workflow-tab 'Customise for this goal' button loses its testid. Legacy goal-proposal-workflow-tab.spec.ts drives Customise→editor+Revert→back; proposals journey never opens the Workflow tab (GAP).

The goal-assistant Create Goal request drops the user-enabled optional steps (always sends undefined). Legacy goal-creation.spec.ts asserts the created goal's enabledOptionalSteps contains the toggled 'QA testing' step; goal-editing journey never drives the optional-steps toggle through creation (GAP).

A provisional project (created via Add Project → assistant) loses its '(setting up)' sidebar indicator. Legacy project-assistant.spec.ts asserts the provisional '(setting up)' marker; project-settings journey only checks shell stability (GAP).

The multi-repo scan Continue-with-assistant autoPrompt sends ALL scan item ids instead of only the user-selected subset. Legacy add-project-multi-repo-subset.spec.ts asserts the autoPrompt JSON selectedIds equals the chosen subset; project-onboarding journey never inspects the autoPrompt (GAP).

The project-proposal Workflows-view workflow cards lose their testid. Legacy project-assistant.spec.ts asserts per-component + all-components workflow cards render under the Workflows tab; proposals journey does not exercise the project-proposal structured views (GAP).
